pricing_rules: Minimum rate target is around $1.40-$1.50 per mile
In California, rates around $1/mile may be acceptable
Dallas is a good location on Monday, so can accept cheaper rates
From Florida it's hardest to leave - take any money to get out
Short local loads in the evening can pay $400-$700
When stuck in bad location before Friday, take any rate to move
Owner offering $2/mile in a good location is considered too low
